name: ZW Data Action Technologies Inc.
business: ZW Data Action Technologies Inc. provides Internet advertising, precision marketing, influencer marketing, data analysis, blockchain-based SaaS, and intellectual property licensing services. The company primarily serves small and medium enterprises (SMEs), with a strategic shift to markets outside mainland China. Revenue was $4.61 million in 2025.

exposures.sentence: We primarily operate a one-stop services for our clients on our Omni-channel advertising, precision marketing, influencer marketing and data analysis management system.
We also develop blockchain enabled web/mobile applications and provide software solutions, i.e., Software-as-a-Service ( SaaS ) services for clients.
In addition, we provide intellectual property licensing services.
We offer influencer marketing services that help our clients enhance their visibility and reach through influencer generated content.
Building on this foundation, the Company will expand its capabilities to include AI-enabled applications and deployment solutions, with a focus on enhancing existing service offerings.

Modest is principally engaged in providing consulting and technology development services related to the tokenization of real-world assets, including token economics design, blockchain platform development, ecosystem infrastructure support, and digital asset monitoring and management.
Privacy and data security are rapidly evolving areas of concern and regulation.

catalysts.event: Acquisition of 19.6% equity in Titans Investment Asset Holdings Limited
catalysts.sentence: On October 21, 2025, CNET Technology obtained the Titans Equity Interests; however, as of the date of this report, the Company has not yet issued the 200,000 shares of common stock to the Sellers and the closing of the transaction has not yet taken place.

catalysts.event: Acquisition of 9.9% equity in Modest Attack Limited (pending)
catalysts.sentence: On October 28, 2025, CNET Technology entered into a purchase agreement (the Acquisition Agreement ) with Fun Star Group INC., a British Virgin Islands company (the Seller ) and Modest Attack Limited, a British Virgin Islands company ( Modest ), pursuant to which the Seller will sell its 9.9% equity interests in Modest (the Modest Equity Interests ) to CNET Technology.

catalysts.event: Nasdaq minimum bid price deficiency compliance deadline
catalysts.sentence: The Nasdaq rules provided us a compliance period of 180 calendar days from the Notice, or until September 22, 2026, to regain compliance with Rule 5550(a)(2).

tamClaims.claim: Global advertising spending grew 5.5% in 2025 and is forecast to rise by approximately US$50 billion (5.1% year-over-year) in 2026.
tamClaims.sentence: According to the 2025 Global Ad spend forecasts published by Dentsu International, the global advertising spending is expected have grown by 5.5% in 2025. Looking forward in 2026, global advertising spend is forecasted to rise by approximately US$50 billion which represents a 5.1% year-over-year growth.

tamClaims.claim: Digital channels reached US$668.4 billion and 67.6% of total ad-spend in 2025, expected to increase to 68.7% in 2026 and 70% in 2027.
tamClaims.sentence: global ad-spending growth continues to be dominated by digital channels, which reached US$668.4 billion and achieved 67.6% of the total ad-spend in 2025, and is expected to further increase to 68.7% and 70% of the total ad-spending in 2026 and 2027, respectively.

tamClaims.claim: Algorithm driven advertising spend is forecasted to be 71.6% of total advertising spend by 2026 and 76% by 2028.
tamClaims.sentence: Algorithm driven advertising spend is forecasted to be 71.6% of total advertising spend by 2026. By 2028, algorithm driven advertising spend is projected to reach 76%, as artificial intelligence continues to impact the media and marketing ecosystem.
